title: carpinus hebestroma
intro: Carpinus hebestroma, also known as the Korean hornbeam, is a species of deciduous tree native to the mountainous regions of Korea and Japan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids in its bark. The health benefits of Carpinus hebestroma include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Carpinus hebestroma is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and its bark is also used in traditional herbal preparations to treat fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues.
